response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Intro and outro talk manually transcribed from audio. Song lyrics matched Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON utilized for song lyrics. Intro and outro talk required manual transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps strictly anchored to vocal activations. Song lines grouped for readability and character limits. Visual text for song credits included during the instrumental intro.

subtitles.original: You're so awesome, Nerissa.
